title: houttea gardneri
intro: Houttea gardneri, also known as the Borneo tea tree or Houttuynia, is a plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the Borneo region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of catechins and other polyphenols, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Houttea gardneri include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the management of certain infections. Houttea gardneri can be prepared as an herbal tea by steeping its leaves in hot water, or it can be consumed as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
